feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cheques Encashment date field is missing in FBL1N table
entry.content:
Hi Team,

The user wanted to see the Cheques Encashment Date field in the tcode FBL1N. This field can be seen in the ECC but same cant be seen in S4 hana. Can you please confirm on the same.

Thanks,

entry.title: Transactions ABF1 and ABF1L
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

We see that transactions ABF1 and ABF1L are currently obsolete in S4/HANA. Is there a solution in S4 to allow manual entries directly to the asset general ledger account without specifying a fixed asset master data?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Memory_Size of Expensive Statements in DB monitor
entry.content:
A huge value shows under column Memory_Size of Expensive Statements in DB monitor(DB02, DBACOCKPIT, etc.)

Is this OSS Note 3239915 applicable to only SCALE OUT or to SCALE IN as well 

please confirm

entry.title: The function module CONVERT_BDCMSGCOLL_TO_BAPIRET2 does not exist in the system S/4 release 2023
entry.content:
Hi

We have upgraded to HANA 2023 and we had used the function module CONVERT_BDCMSGCOLL_TO_BAPIRET2 in some of our programs.  As per SAP note 3411865, The function module CONVERT_BDCMSGCOLL_TO_BAPIRET2 does not exist in the system S/4 release 2023. We have checked for any replacement FM but didn't find any. This note is also not implementable. Kindly provide an alternate FM as we need this functionality for some of our developments

 

Regards

Vijay

entry.title: 別表16 法カテゴリ1,2,3の判断ロジックについて
entry.content: ALVで出力される法カテゴリ(GLO_ANX16_METH_CAT)１，２，３の判断ロジックが不明です。

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Standard OCI Integration Support in Purchase Orders – Price Mapping
entry.content:
Good morning,

I am writting referring to the previous OSS message 275003/2026 in order to clarify that when we create a purchase requisition from catalog the price is retrieved from the item catalog not from item contract and later it is converted to a purchase order, the price from contract is not part of the PO pricing determination but the price from purchase requisition. 

Why the system behavior is not the same if we add a new item to the PO from catalog? We have checked in our SRM system and the price is retrieved from the catalog when a new item is added to a PO.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards.

Carlos Morrugares

entry.title: Demand PO re-process/re-trigger once released.
entry.content:
In Demand PO process, PO is initially blocked due to compliance(SPL, embargo and legal control) and later released after checks in SAP GTS.
The output is blocked with the help of "Prevent output for...."for blocked PO and after release, output is not automatically re-triggered. Requires manual intervention. Whether there is any standard configuration/functionality available to automatically re-trigger Output after PO release.If not standard, which recommended enhancement point should be used to trigger the output upon release status change.
Any SAP note or best practice exists for this scenario in Demand PO integration with (GTS)GTP

entry.title: How to restrict posting in previous periods in MIGO/MIRO for specific users
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are using S/4HANA and have a requirement where only a limited number of users should be able to post goods movements and invoices (MIGO / MIRO) in previous periods, while all other users should be restricted.

What would be the recommended approach to achieve this?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Required Fiori Usage Statistics
entry.content:
Hello Team

We would like to analyze SAP Fiori Launchpad usage to derive insights such as:

  • Most used Fiori applications (especially Analytical apps)
  • Frequently active users
  • Inactive users (no login / no app usage)
  • App usage trends over time

Can you please guide me how to get those details. It will help us to plan for on-going deliverables 

Regards,

Santosh Nanduri

entry.title: Sales Order Costing for Project Case
entry.content:
Please advise related to below case:

Sales Order is assigned WBS as cost object and material should be costed via Sales order costing.
However, company requires to have cost posting instead of inventory during purchase order GR.

We cannot change OBYC setting / requirement class because the same material will be used for normal process.

SO -> CK55 -> PR/PO -> GR (expense)

Is it possible to modify EBAN-KZBWS from M to blank?
or can we remove VBAP-KZBWS from sales order?

entry.title: WT confirmation via /SCWM/RFUI does not trigger Suitable enhancement / BADI after posting
entry.content:
The ask is to trigger a web service automatically when a Warehouse Task is confirmed and posted to the database for a particular warehouse num (LGNUM).

Analysis Performed:Debugged RFUI WT confirmation flow Traced execution through function modules and classes Verified that: No relevant BAdI (CALL BADI) is triggered during RF confirmation.

 Checked potential function module: /SCWM/TO_CONFIRM Identified as a possible common posting point, but not confirmed as enhancement-safeQuestion to SAP:

  1. What is the recommended enhancement point (BAdI/User Exit) to trigger custom logic after WT confirmation that works for both: /SCWM/TO_CONF and /SCWM/RFUI 
  2. Is there any standard BAdI or enhancement spot available at the common posting layer of WT confirmation?
  3. Can /SCWM/TO_CONFIRM be safely enhanced for this purpose, or is there a standard alternative?

entry.title: PO creator should have access to return PR
entry.content:
Flexible workflow has been implemented in pr and po workflows. 

PO creator should have access to return PR like Oracle

Is there any possibilites or features in SAP.

entry.title: I would like to know the post-processing requirements after SAP router server migration
entry.content:
Dear SAP Technicians.

This is my first time doing SAP Router. I want to get your help as there are a lot of things I don't know.
We are preparing to migrate the SAP Router server from the existing server (Red hot linux 8.8) to the new server (Red hot linux 8.10).
We are preparing to install a new SAP Router with the list below.
Installation file
*saprouter_635-80007328.sar
*SAPCRYPTOLIBP_8604-20011697.SAR
*SAPCAR_1400-70007716.EXE

It's a question.
1. Is the installation of the host agent necessary?
2. After installing SAP Router, will the files that need to be copied from the existing server be hosts file, saproutab file?
3. Is there anything I need to do in sap for me or sap gui (s/4 hana, erp, bw etc..)?

Thank you. all

entry.title: S/4HANA 2025におけるALV更新（REFRESH_TABLE_DISPLAY）実行時のエラーについて
entry.content:
S/4HANA 2025環境にて、ALVのデータ更新処理を行う際にエラーが発生しております。
つきましては、以下の2点の実装方式における原因と解決策をご教示ください。
関数型ALV（REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY）
オブジェクト指向型ALV（CL_GUI_ALV_GRID）

entry.title: Cost center master data maintenance Fiori
entry.content:
Cost center master data maintenance Fiori

Is there an SAP Standard solution on Maintenance of Cost center master data (single/multiple) in Fiori with workflow approval without using MDG as we're not using MDG.

New cost centers should also be added in an alternative cost center hierarchy.

entry.title: Issue with DME file
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We use DME structure to generate payment files and initiate bank transfer for Vendors. During this process, we face a peculiar situation wherein, fields "INSTDAMT" and "CCY" are printed in DMEE file without Space.(gets merged)

This causes our Treasury system to reject the whole payment. Out of 50 individual payments, this happens to 2 payments this time. We ran the reprint of DMEE again but got the same result.

Note that this happened earlier week, but on reprint, the issue was corrected. Find enclosed a word document with screen shots:

DMEE TREE: ZFI_TRAX_PAIN001_DE_INT

- DMEE Tree portion relevant for the Node
- DMEE file with error line items highlighted.

Regards
Uday Kumar

entry.title: Display corresponding infotype settings when switching between different countries in PA30.
entry.content:
1、We have a global project with users in three regions: Chinese mainland, Taiwan region of China, and Vietnam.

2、Display country grouping–specific infotype settings when switching among country groupings 99, 42, and 28 in PA30.

3、How to enable a user to switch between country/region-specific infotype displays in PA30 after logging on.

For example, when viewing an employee in Vietnam and selecting the relevant country grouping, the infotype display can be switched to show the infotypes under country grouping 99.

4、I have attempted to configure it using the settings below, but it did not work.

entry.title: FBデータを出力する際、プログラムについて
entry.content:
NOTE:3370503にて、DMEEがS/4HANA2029で無効化され、DMEEXに置き換える必要があるとアナウンスされています。

日本では、FBデータを出力する際、プログラム：RFFOJP_T(日本用支払媒体 国内DME)を使用していますが

DMEEXに置き換える必要はない(DMEE廃止による影響はない)と考えて宜しいでしょうか？

entry.title: BOM Qty not picked in the cost estimate
entry.content: BOM Qty not picked in the cost estimate

entry.title: Unable to add PDF Form against company code US28 and Payment method T
entry.content: Hi Team, In FBZP tcode we have to assign custom payment advice FORM in PDF format while checking in payment method in company code field FORM for the payment medium shows with non-editable option i.e. "SAPscript" there is no option to change format
